mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bill_usage_record ( id, tenant_id, metric_type, usage_value, record_date, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version ) VALUES
( #{record.id}, #{record.tenantId}, #{record.metricType}, #{record.usageValue}, #{record.recordDate}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.createdTime}, #{record.updatedBy}, #{record.updatedTime}, #{record.deleted}, #{record.version} )
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, metric_type, record_date) WHERE deleted = FALSE DO UPDATE SET usage_value = EXCLUDED.usage_value, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_time = EXCLUDED.updated_time, version = bill_usage_record.version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'LOGIN_COUNT' AND record_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{recentDays} days' AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT record_date AS date, SUM(usage_value)::BIGINT AS count FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'LOGIN_COUNT' AND record_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{recentDays} days' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY record_date ORDER BY record_date DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(usage_value), 0) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (tenant_id) usage_value FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'STORAGE_MB' AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY tenant_id, record_date DESC ) latest_storage
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(usage_value)::BIGINT, 0) FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'API_CALLS' AND record_date = CURRENT_DATE AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_name AS tenantName, t.expire_time AS expireTime, COALESCE(u.user_count, 0) AS userCount, COALESCE(s.storage_mb, 0) AS storageMb, COALESCE(a.api_calls_total, 0) AS apiCallsTotal, COALESCE(l.login_count_last30d, 0) AS loginCountLast30d, CASE WHEN t.expire_time IS NOT NULL AND t.expire_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS isExpiringSoon FROM sys_tenant t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, usage_value AS user_count FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'USER_COUNT' AND deleted = FALSE AND (tenant_id, record_date) IN ( SELECT tenant_id, MAX(record_date) FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'USER_COUNT' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) ) u ON t.id = u.tenant_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, usage_value AS storage_mb FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'STORAGE_MB' AND deleted = FALSE AND (tenant_id, record_date) IN ( SELECT tenant_id, MAX(record_date) FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'STORAGE_MB' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) ) s ON t.id = s.tenant_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, SUM(usage_value)::BIGINT AS api_calls_total FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'API_CALLS' AND record_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) a ON t.id = a.tenant_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, SUM(usage_value)::BIGINT AS login_count_last30d FROM bill_usage_record WHERE metric_type = 'LOGIN_COUNT' AND record_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND deleted = FALSE GROUP BY tenant_id ) l ON t.id = l.tenant_id WHERE t.deleted = FALSE ORDER BY t.id
